sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Amt2 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, GL, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC  and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt3 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, GL, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC  and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt4 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, GL, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC  and f1.BusCat = f2.BusCat and f1.TTY = f2.TTY and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z003' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt3

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, '' as TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP <> '' )
update TransX set TTY = '822' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '100' and GL like '14%9997'
update TransX set TTY = '832' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '100' and GL = '1599997'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1,PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PK is NULL or Amt1 = 0)
update TransX set Flex5 = 'Canada RSG Translation 2200 clr', Flex6 = '', Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = ABS(Amt1) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger,Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
